offer: For logistics dispatch coordinators processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual entry causes late payments and cash flow gaps. We automate the conversion of delivery logs into billing submissions instead of manual entry.
problem: Manual conversion of delivery logs into billing submissions leads to errors and delays.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for logistics dispatch coordinators
Indie Hackers posts about similar workflows
DM outreach to logistics dispatch coordinators with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools among coordinators
try_it: Let users try manual override option for adjustments and Manual invoice entry form on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
